post_fix_for: VIB-4483 (P-V1-B): native-ETH V4 pool support — lift V0 adapter/parser guards and add post-mint QueryV4PositionState gateway read to stamp the native-ETH deposit amount onto LPOpenData at ledger-build time.

VIB-4483 (seed): native-currency V4 pairs seeded into the canonical PoolKey registry (almanak/connectors/uniswap_v4/gateway/canonical_pools.py) so the gateway resolves native-pool PoolKeys deterministically. Without this the native poolId fell through the out-of-window Initialize scan to pool_key_not_found and lp_open_data/lp_close_data were dropped.

VIB-4483 (fixture sizing): native LP leg + both swap-back lanes (iteration + teardown) gas-reserve sized so the round-trip is solvent and value-sized on a managed Anvil fork (native balance == gas float).
VIB-4483 (G15): accountant_test.py G15 no longer demands Track C coverage for wallet/TOKEN swap-inventory pseudo-positions (VIB-5057), which are excluded from Track C by the materializer.
_provenance.note: Post-fix baseline for lp_v4_native (native ETH/USDC/3000 pool on Base — currency0=0x0, deepest native tier; mirrors wrapped lp_v4 WETH/USDC/3000). Score: 18/22 PASS. Native pairs are now seeded into the canonical V4 PoolKey registry, so LookupV4PoolKey resolves the native poolId (0xe070797535b13431808f8fc81fdbe7b41362960ed0b55bc2b6117c49c51b7eb9) deterministically and lp_open_data/lp_close_data are no longer dropped. The native amount0 stamp fires: accounting_events LP_OPEN carries a positive native amount0 (~0.001093 ETH, value-sized ~$1.8) derived from the post-mint QueryV4PositionState gateway read. Clean round-trip: SWAP -> LP_OPEN -> HOLD -> LP_CLOSE (teardown) -> SWAP-back, all 4 intents succeeded, teardown reached completed with positions_failed=0. G1/G6 FAIL: pre-existing — the SWAP rows lack a USD valuation for the native-ETH/WETH leg at event time (price not in price_inputs_json on the Anvil fork); same root cause, not a native-V4 regression. G11 SKIP: no failed intents (clean teardown). L5_22 XFAIL: position_registry mode not toggled. G3/LP1/LP2/LP3/LP4/LP5/LP6/G14/G15 PASS. Versus the pre-fix baseline (12/22) this is +6 PASS (G3, LP1, LP2, LP3, LP6) plus LP4 XFAIL->PASS, with G15 held at PASS by the Track-C-eligibility filter (a clean cash-holding post-close snapshot would otherwise false-fail it).
